meaning: adj.干酪质的,<美俚>(质量)低劣的,下等的,<英俚>俊俏的,潇洒的
examples: She had a cheesy grin on her face.
One explanation might be the loss of dignity displayed through a cheesy grin.
He waved with a big cheesy grin.
This movie gets dismissed as campy and cheesy, mainly because it is campy and cheesy.
This talk of footsteps, ghosts and allusions to dusty diamond failures is facile, cheesy.
